submit_method: CDP (Chrome --remote-debugging-port=9222) — char-by-char Input.dispatchKeyEvent typing + trusted Input.dispatchMouseEvent click on .send-button-container; this bypasses the isTrusted=false guard that blocked windows-mcp synthetic input in baseline #1137/#1163
regression_note: NOT a confirmed PASS->FAIL regression. Last-known kimi verdict was INCONCLUSIVE_submit_failed (#1137, #1163) — kimi has NEVER been confirmed PASS, so no PASS baseline exists to regress from. This is the first run to actually deliver the prompt to the kimi backend.
notes: Baseline #1137/#1163 were INCONCLUSIVE_submit_failed: kimi's Lexical contenteditable (Vue shell, data-v-* scoped styles) rejected windows-mcp synthetic Enter/click (isTrusted=false), so the prompt never reached the backend and we could not distinguish engine-works from engine-doesn't. This run resolved the submit channel: launched Chrome with --remote-debugging-port=9222 against a dedicated --user-data-dir (Chrome 136+ silently disables remote debugging on the default profile; copied Default/Network cookies + Local State + prefs to C:\cdp-kimi to preserve the 최장희 login). Typed the PII prompt char-by-char via CDP Input.dispatchKeyEvent (insertText alone left Vue's reactive model stale so the send handler no-op'd; char events fire the real beforeinput pipeline that updates Lexical+Vue state). Trusted CDP mouse click on .send-button-container (1235,378) THEN fired POST https://www.kimi.com/apiv2/kimi.gateway.chat.v1.ChatService/Chat. Captured TWO such submits, both returning HTTP 200. Despite 200 responses and prompt reaching the backend, the frontend rendered NO conversation pane, NO assistant response, NO message bubbles; URL stayed at kimi.com root (no /chat/<id> transition); editor retained the prompt; and crucially NO '차단' text, no toast/modal/alert/dialog appeared anywhere in the DOM after a 60s observation window. dom innerText scan for '차단' = not found; toast/modal/role=alert/role=dialog query = 0 elements. Because submit demonstrably succeeded (200, backend reached) yet the expected warning never rendered, verdict is FAIL_NOT_RENDERED (no longer INCONCLUSIVE_submit_failed). Open question / engine_intercept_fired=null: cannot confirm whether the APF engine intercepted — the 200 with empty frontend render is consistent with EITHER (a) engine replacing the connect-rpc/gRPC-web stream body with a block payload that kimi's frontend cannot parse (silent failure, no warning UI for this service), OR (b) the legacy NULL-handler path simply not injecting a renderable '차단' warning into kimi's stream framing. Either way, from the user-visible-warning criterion this is FAIL_NOT_RENDERED. Screenshots: 01_pre_submit (logged-in home), 02_prompt_typed (PII prompt in editor), 03_post_submit_5s, 04_final_60s (prompt still in box, no conversation/no warning).
